{% extends "!layout.html" %} {# Inject a giscus comment thread at the end of the article body. Pages may opt out by adding `:allow_comments: False` at the top of the .rst, matching godot-docs convention (used by classes/index.rst, for example). #} {% block document %} {{ super() }} {% if show_comments and (not meta or meta.get('allow_comments') != 'False') %}
